creator: jedgar@fxp.org
text:
On a fresh install of mysql322-server using the current port (BTW,
errmsg.h is installed from mysql322-client, which is a dependency of
mysql322-server):

$FreeBSD: ports/databases/mysql322-server/Makefile,v 1.72 2000/01/25 
14:34:35 dirk Exp $
$FreeBSD: ports/databases/mysql322-client/Makefile,v 1.62 1999/08/25
05:21:19 obrien Exp $

jedgar@earth:~$ ls /usr/local/include/mysql
dbug.h     m_string.h   my_list.h     mysql.h          mysqld_error.h
errmsg.h   my_config.h  my_pthread.h  mysql_com.h      raid.h
m_ctype.h  my_global.h  my_sys.h      mysql_version.h
jedgar@earth:~$

Are you seeing something different using the port?

-----
Chris D. Faulhaber - jedgar@fxp.org - jedgar@FreeBSD.org
